sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255), created_at TIMESTAMP, profits DECIMAL(10, 2));
INSERT INTO test_data VALUES (1, 'Test A', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 1000.00);
INSERT INTO test_data VALUES (2, 'Test B', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, NULL);
INSERT INTO test_data VALUES (3, 'Test C', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 1234567890.12);
INSERT INTO test_data VALUES (4, NULL, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 0.00);
INSERT INTO test_data VALUES (5, 'Test D', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, -100.50);
SELECT name || ' - ' || profits FROM test_data WHERE profits IS NOT NULL;
SELECT name, created_at, profits FROM test_data WHERE profits > (SELECT AVG(profits) FROM test_data WHERE profits IS NOT NULL) || ' units';
SELECT name || CASE WHEN profits IS NULL THEN ' No Profit' ELSE ' Profit: ' || profits END AS profit_info FROM test_data;
SELECT DISTINCT name || ' created at ' || CAST(created_at AS VARCHAR) FROM test_data WHERE created_at > '2023-01-01' ORDER BY created_at;
UPDATE test_data SET profits = profits || 100 WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_data WHERE profits IS NOT NULL AND profits < 500);

WITH RankedData AS (SELECT name, profits, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY profits DESC) AS rank FROM test_data WHERE profits IS NOT NULL) SELECT name || ' is ranked ' || rank AS ranking_info FROM RankedData WHERE rank <= 3;
